endpoints.name: Get closed positions for a client, accountGroup or account

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: AccountGroupKey
parameters.description: The key of the account group to which the closed positions belongs.

parameters.name: AccountKey
parameters.description: The key of the account to which the closed positions belongs.

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: The key of the client to which the closesd positions belongs.

parameters.name: ClosedPositionId
parameters.description: The id of the closed position to which the closedposition belongs

parameters.name: FieldGroups
parameters.description: Specifies which data to return. Default is [ClosedPosition]

children.name: ClosedPosition
children.description: Closed position data which is calculated differently whether viewed at client or account level

children.name: ClosedPositionDetails
children.description: Detailed information about a closed position. Applicable when ClosedPositionId is included in the request and not a subscription request.

children.name: DisplayAndFormat
children.description: Information about the instrument of the net position and how to display it.

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange. This includes Exchange name, exchange code and open status.

parameters.name: AccountGroupKey
parameters.description: The key of the account group to which the closed positions belongs.

parameters.name: AccountKey
parameters.description: The key of the account to which the closed positions belongs.

parameters.name: ClientKey
parameters.description: The key of the client to which the closesd positions belongs.

parameters.name: ClosedPositionId
parameters.description: Unique id of the position.

parameters.name: FieldGroups
parameters.description: Specifies which data to return. Default is [ClosedPosition]

endpoints.name: Create a subscription on a list of closed positions and make it active

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: Arguments
parameters.description: Arguments for the subscription request.

children.name: AccountGroupKey
children.description: The key of the account group to which the closed positions belongs.

children.name: AccountKey
children.description: The key of the account to which the closed positions belongs.

children.name: ClientKey
children.description: The key of the client to which the closesd positions belongs.

children.name: ClosedPositionId
children.description: The id of the closed position to which the closedposition belongs

children.name: FieldGroups
children.description: Specifies which data to return. Default is [ClosedPosition]

children.name: ClosedPosition
children.description: Closed position data which is calculated differently whether viewed at client or account level

children.name: ClosedPositionDetails
children.description: Detailed information about a closed position. Applicable when ClosedPositionId is included in the request and not a subscription request.

children.name: DisplayAndFormat
children.description: Information about the instrument of the net position and how to display it.

children.name: ExchangeInfo
children.description: Adds information about the instrument's exchange. This includes Exchange name, exchange code and open status.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The streaming context id that this request is associated with. This parameter must only contain letters (a-z) and numbers (0-9) as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Optional Media type (RFC 2046) of the serialized data updates that are streamed to the client. Currently only application/json and application/x-protobuf is supported. If an unrecognized format is specified, the subscription end point will return HTTP status code 400 - Bad format.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Mandatory client specified reference id for the subscription. This parameter must only contain alphanumberic characters as well as - (dash) and _ (underscore). Cannot start with _. It is case insensitive. Max length is 50 characters.

parameters.name: RefreshRate
parameters.description: Optional custom refresh rate, measured in milliseconds, between each data update. Note that it is not possible to get a refresh rate lower than the rate specified in the customer service level agreement (SLA).

parameters.name: ReplaceReferenceId
parameters.description: Reference id of the subscription that should be replaced.

parameters.name: Tag Obsolete
parameters.description: : Optional client specified tag used for grouping subscriptions.

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The context id part of the streaming session (used to identify the subscription within a streaming session).

parameters.name: Tag
parameters.description: Optional. Remove only subscriptions that are marked with specified tag.

endpoints.name: Change the closed positions subscription page size

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The context id part of the streaming session.

parameters.name: NewPageSize
parameters.description: Extends or reduces the page size, number of positions shown, on a running positions subscription.

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the subscription

parameters.name: ContextId
parameters.description: The context id part of the streaming session (used to identify the subscription within a streaming session).

parameters.name: ReferenceId
parameters.description: Unique id of the subscription
